description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.15.3 Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, and runs a global before_script that executes `npm install hexo-cli -g`, `test -e package.json && npm install`, and `hexo generate`. Define a single job named pages (which runs in the default stage) that runs the script `hexo generate`, publishes the generated `public` folder as an artifact, and is only triggered when `$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH` (i.e., on the default branch), effectively deploying the site to GitLab Pages.
